creator: freebsd@skysmurf.nl
text:
Created attachment 144637
Patch to update the Makefile, pkg-plist and to add/remove other files.

The port x11-fonts/cyberbit-ttf hasn't been converted to support staging yet and has been orphaned. I converted the port to support staging, volunteer to maintain it and fixed a few other things.

The attached patch:
* sets new MAINTAINER
* adds new maintainer's mirror to MASTER_SITES
* fixes grammar in COMMENT
* cleans up the way mkfont{dir,scale} are handled
* cleans up the way docs are handled
* uses files/pkg-message.in instead of ${ECHO_CMD}
* adds staging support

The port has been checked with Portlint.
